confirm.transcriptionDisable: कॉल ट्रांसक्रिप्शन अक्षम करें? स्वयंसेवकों की कॉल अब स्वचालित रूप से ट्रांसक्राइब नहीं होंगी।

confirm.captchaDisable: वॉइस CAPTCHA अक्षम करें? कॉल करने वाले बिना सत्यापन के सीधे कनेक्ट हो जाएंगे।
confirm.rateLimitEnable: दर सीमा सक्षम करें? एक ही नंबर से बार-बार कॉल अस्थायी रूप से ब्लॉक हो जाएंगी।
confirm.rateLimitDisable: दर सीमा अक्षम करें? एक ही नंबर से बार-बार कॉल पर कोई सीमा नहीं होगी।

telephonyProvider.title: Telephony Provider
telephonyProvider.description: Configure the telephony provider used for handling calls
telephonyProvider.phoneNumberHelp: The phone number callers dial (E.164 format)
telephonyProvider.bridgeCallbackUrlHelp: URL where the ARI bridge sends webhooks to this app

providerDescriptions.twilio: Industry-standard cloud telephony. Easiest to set up with excellent documentation.
providerDescriptions.signalwire: Twilio-compatible API at lower cost. Drop-in replacement for most use cases.
providerDescriptions.vonage: Global telephony provider with strong international coverage and competitive pricing.
providerDescriptions.plivo: Cost-effective cloud telephony with a clean API. Good for budget-conscious deployments.
providerDescriptions.asterisk: Self-hosted PBX for maximum control and lowest per-minute cost. Requires server setup.

telephonyProvider.notImplemented: This provider is not yet implemented. Please use Twilio or SignalWire.
telephonyProvider.webrtcConfigHelp: स्वयंसेवकों के लिए ब्राउज़र-आधारित कॉलिंग सक्षम करें। अतिरिक्त क्रेडेंशियल आवश्यक हैं।
telephonyProvider.apiKeySidHelp: अपने Twilio/SignalWire कंसोल में API Key जनरेट करें
telephonyProvider.twimlAppSidHelp: अपने webhook की ओर इशारा करते हुए वॉइस URL के साथ एक TwiML App बनाएं

onboarding.noCode: कोई आमंत्रण कोड नहीं दिया गया

onboarding.generatingKeys: आपकी कुंजियाँ बनाई जा रही हैं...
onboarding.backupDescription: इस रिकवरी कुंजी को लिख लें और सुरक्षित रखें। नए डिवाइस पर अपना खाता पुनर्प्राप्त करने का यही एकमात्र तरीका है।
onboarding.recoveryKeyWarning: इसे लिख लें और सुरक्षित रूप से संग्रहित करें। यदि आप अपना PIN और यह कुंजी दोनों खो देते हैं, तो आपका खाता पुनर्प्राप्त नहीं किया जा सकता।
onboarding.storageTipsTitle: अपनी रिकवरी कुंजी को कैसे स्टोर करें
onboarding.storageTip1: इसे पासवर्ड मैनेजर में सहेजें (1Password, Bitwarden, आदि)
onboarding.storageTip2: इसे एक व्यक्तिगत डिवाइस पर स्टोर करें जिसे केवल आप एक्सेस कर सकते हैं
onboarding.storageTip3: इसे लिख लें और इसे भौतिक रूप से सुरक्षित स्थान पर रखें
onboarding.backupAcknowledge: मैंने अपनी रिकवरी कुंजी को एक सुरक्षित स्थान पर सहेज लिया है
onboarding.title: Your Secret Key

pin.createDescription: इस डिवाइस पर अपनी कुंजी की सुरक्षा के लिए 6 अंकों का PIN चुनें
pin.confirmDescription: पुष्टि के लिए अपना PIN दोबारा दर्ज करें
pin.mismatch: PIN मेल नहीं खाते। पुनः प्रयास करें।
pin.confirm_subtitle: Enter the same PIN again to confirm
pin.set_subtitle: Choose a 4-6 digit PIN to protect your key

deviceLink.title: डिवाइस जोड़ें
deviceLink.description: अपने मौजूदा खाते से जोड़कर इस डिवाइस को सेट अप करें।
deviceLink.instructions: अपने प्राथमिक डिवाइस पर, सेटिंग्स में जाएं और 'जुड़े हुए डिवाइस' सेक्शन खोलें। फिर QR कोड स्कैन करें या यहां दिखाया गया कोड दर्ज करें।
deviceLink.waitingForPrimary: प्राथमिक डिवाइस की प्रतीक्षा हो रही है
deviceLink.scanFromPrimary: अपने प्राथमिक डिवाइस की सेटिंग्स से यह कोड स्कैन करें।
deviceLink.orEnterCode: या अपने प्राथमिक डिवाइस पर यह कोड दर्ज करें:
deviceLink.expiresIn5: यह कोड 5 मिनट में समाप्त हो जाएगा।
deviceLink.linkSuccessDesc: आपका खाता अब इस डिवाइस पर उपलब्ध है। इसकी सुरक्षा के लिए PIN सेट करें।
deviceLink.linkExpired: लिंकिंग सत्र समाप्त हो गया। कृपया पुनः प्रयास करें।
deviceLink.linkedDevicesDesc: प्रावधान कोड दर्ज करके अपने खाते में नया डिवाइस जोड़ें।
deviceLink.linkFromPrimary: नया डिवाइस जोड़ने के लिए, नए डिवाइस पर Hotline ऐप खोलें, 'इस डिवाइस को जोड़ें' पर टैप करें, फिर नीचे दिखाया गया कोड दर्ज करें।
deviceLink.codePlaceholder: QR डेटा या कोड पेस्ट करें...
deviceLink.invalidCode: अमान्य प्रावधान कोड। कृपया QR कोड स्कैन करें या पूरा कोड कॉपी करें।
deviceLink.verifySASDesc: Compare this code with the code shown on your primary device.
deviceLink.verifySASPrimary: Verify this code matches the code on the new device:
deviceLink.compareCodes: Both devices must show the same code. If the codes don't match, do NOT proceed — an attacker may be present.
deviceLink.sasMismatch: Security codes did not match. The linking session has been aborted for your safety. Please try again.
deviceLink.decryptFailed: Failed to decrypt key from primary device. Please try again.

conversations.selectConversation: संदेश देखने के लिए बातचीत चुनें

contacts.description: कॉल, बातचीत और रिपोर्ट में एकीकृत इंटरैक्शन इतिहास देखें।

profileSettings.securityKeysDescription: Manage WebAuthn credentials for step-up authentication

setup.title: Setup Wizard
setup.pinRequired: Enter your PIN to continue setup.
setup.complete: Setup complete! Welcome to your hotline.
setup.identityDescription: Choose a name and language for your crisis hotline.
setup.hotlineNameHelp: This is shown to volunteers in the app. For security, the PWA uses a generic name.
setup.primaryLanguageHelp: The default language for the admin interface and IVR prompts.
setup.channelsDescription: Select the channels your hotline will use. You can enable more later.
setup.channelVoiceDesc: Traditional phone calls routed to on-shift volunteers via parallel ringing.
setup.channelSmsDesc: Text message conversations with callers via your hotline number.
setup.channelWhatsappDesc: WhatsApp messaging for callers who prefer it over phone or SMS.
setup.channelSignalDesc: Signal messaging for maximum caller privacy via a self-hosted bridge.
setup.channelReportsDesc: Encrypted reports submitted directly through the web app. Built-in, no provider needed.
setup.selectOneChannel: Please select at least one channel
setup.providersDescription: Set up the services that power your selected channels.
setup.noProvidersNeeded: No external providers needed for your selected channels. You can proceed to the next step.
setup.signalDescription: Connect to a self-hosted Signal bridge for end-to-end encrypted messaging.
setup.whatsappTwilioNote: WhatsApp messages will be handled through your existing Twilio telephony provider. No additional configuration needed.
setup.settingsDescription: Configure basic settings for your selected channels. You can fine-tune these later.
setup.noSettingsNeeded: No additional settings needed for your selected channels.
setup.queueTimeoutHelp: How long callers wait before being sent to voicemail.
setup.voicemailEnabledHelp: Allow callers to leave a voicemail if no one answers.
setup.autoResponseHelp: Automatically sent when a new conversation starts.
setup.autoResponsePlaceholder: Thank you for reaching out. A volunteer will be with you shortly.
setup.reportCategoriesHelp: Define categories for incoming reports (e.g. Harassment, Threats, Other).
setup.inviteDescription: Generate invite codes for your team. Each code is single-use and expires in 7 days.
setup.summaryDescription: Review your hotline configuration before going live.

bootstrap.title: Create Admin Account
bootstrap.welcomeDescription: Let's create your admin account. Your cryptographic identity is generated in your browser — the server never sees your private key.
bootstrap.noAdminMessage: No admin account configured yet. Complete the setup wizard to get started.

reports.title: Reports
reports.fillRequired: Please fill in the required fields
reports.selectReport: Select a report to view details
reports.dropzone: Drop files here or click to browse

hubs.title: Hub Management
hubs.createHubDescription: Create a new hub to organize your hotline operations.
hubs.editHubDescription: Update the hub name, description, or phone number.
hubs.hubDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this hub's purpose...
hubs.hubPhoneNumberHelp: The primary phone number for this hub (E.164 format).
hubs.noHubs: No hubs yet. Create a hub to start organizing your hotline.

admin.ban_hash_placeholder: SHA-256 hash of phone number or identifier
admin.title: Admin

error.invalid_nsec: The provided nsec key is invalid
error.pin_locked_out: Too many failed attempts. Please wait and try again.
error.pin_too_long: PIN must be at most 6 digits
error.pin_too_short: PIN must be at least 4 digits

help.admin_audit_detail: Every action is logged in a tamper-evident chain. View who answered calls, created notes, and made changes. The hash chain ensures logs cannot be modified after the fact.
help.admin_reports_detail: Review incident reports filed by volunteers. View contact timelines showing all interactions with a caller. Caller identifiers are HMAC-hashed for privacy.
help.admin_shifts_detail: Set up recurring shift schedules with ring groups. Configure fallback groups for when no scheduled shift is active. Volunteers can only receive calls when clocked into their shift.
help.admin_spam_detail: Enable voice CAPTCHA to filter automated calls. Configure rate limiting per caller. Manage ban lists to block known bad actors. All settings can be adjusted in real-time.
help.admin_volunteers_detail: Invite new volunteers with invite codes. Assign roles, manage permissions, and deactivate accounts as needed. Volunteer personal information is only visible to admins.
help.faq_admin_a1: Go to Admin Panel > Invites and create a new invite code. Share the code securely with the volunteer. They'll use it during onboarding to register with your hub.
help.faq_admin_a2: Go to Admin Panel > Ban List and add the caller's phone number. Banned callers will hear a message and be disconnected automatically.
help.faq_admin_a3: Yes. The Audit Log in the Admin Panel shows all actions: calls answered, notes created, shifts started/ended, and more. The log is tamper-evident with hash chaining.
help.faq_admin_q1: How do I add a new volunteer?
help.faq_admin_q2: How do I ban a caller?
help.faq_admin_q3: Can I see all volunteer activity?
help.faq_calls_a1: Make sure you are clocked in for your shift and not on break. Check that your internet connection is stable (the relay connection indicator should be green).
help.faq_calls_a2: If you don't answer, the call continues ringing for other on-shift volunteers. The first volunteer to pick up handles the call. Missed calls are logged in the dashboard.
help.faq_calls_q1: Why am I not receiving calls?
help.faq_calls_q2: What happens if I miss a call?
help.faq_gs_a1: Ask your admin for an invite code. Enter the hub URL, create or import your identity, and set a PIN. You'll be ready to receive calls once you clock in for your shift.
help.faq_gs_a2: Your nsec is your secret key — like a password that proves your identity. It's generated on your device and never sent to the server. Back it up securely; if you lose it, you'll need a new identity.
help.faq_gs_a3: Yes. Use the Device Link feature in Settings to securely transfer your identity to another device using a QR code and encrypted key exchange.
help.faq_notes_a1: Yes. Notes are end-to-end encrypted with a unique key per note. Only you and your admins can decrypt them. The server never sees the plaintext content.
help.faq_notes_a2: Notes are append-only for security. You can add additional notes but cannot modify existing ones. This ensures a reliable audit trail.
help.faq_notes_q2: Can I edit a note after saving?
help.title: Help
help.vol_calls_detail: When a caller dials the hotline, all on-shift volunteers ring simultaneously. The first volunteer to pick up handles the call — all other rings are cancelled. Calls are routed based on your shift schedule and availability.
help.vol_encryption_detail: Your secret key (nsec) never leaves your device. Notes and messages are encrypted locally before being sent to the server. Even if the server is compromised, your data remains private.
help.vol_notes_detail: Create notes during or after calls to document interactions. Notes support custom fields defined by your admin. All note content is end-to-end encrypted — only you and admins can read them.
help.vol_safety_detail: Lock the app when stepping away. Use PIN protection to prevent unauthorized access. If you're in a dangerous situation, use Emergency Wipe in Settings to permanently delete all app data from this device.
help.vol_shift_detail: Clock in when your shift starts to begin receiving calls. Use break mode when you need a pause — you'll stop receiving calls but stay logged in. Clock out at the end of your shift.

import.subtitle: Paste your nsec key to restore your identity
import.title: Import Your Key

nsec.display_value: Secret key is displayed. Keep this private.
